description: issue #397: with the data profile NOT active (core-language only), `list` is not a recognized command -- the reader still parses `:path = list` as a bare zero-argument Call (the profile-legality decision belongs to check(), not the reader -- mirroring how a Turtle & Rendering primitive like `forward` behaves when turtle-rendering is inactive, spec/tooling.md:175-176), so check() raises ol-unknown-command (with `last` as its nearest-Core-name did-you-mean suggestion).

diagnostics.message: i don't know how to list. did you mean last?
